tables.name: cards
tables.description: One row per Yu-Gi-Oh! trading card (excludes Tokens and Duel Links Skill Cards)

columns.name: type
columns.description: Card type, e.g. 'Normal Monster', 'Spell Card', 'Trap Card'

columns.name: race
columns.description: Monster type for monsters (e.g. Spellcaster, Dragon) or subtype for Spell/Trap cards (e.g. Continuous, Quick-Play)

columns.name: attribute
columns.description: Monster attribute, e.g. DARK, LIGHT — NULL for Spell/Trap cards

columns.name: atk
columns.description: Attack points — NULL for Spell/Trap cards and for '?' variable-ATK monsters

columns.name: def
columns.description: Defense points — NULL for Spell/Trap cards, Link Monsters, and '?' variable-DEF monsters

columns.name: level
columns.description: Level or Rank — NULL for Spell/Trap cards and Link Monsters

columns.name: archetype
columns.description: Card series/archetype, e.g. 'Dark Magician' — NULL if the card belongs to none

tables.name: card_sets
tables.description: One row per (card, printing) — a card reprinted in multiple sets or rarities has multiple rows

columns.name: set_name
columns.description: Name of the set the card was printed in, e.g. Legend of Blue Eyes White Dragon

tables.name: banlist
tables.description: Restricted-card list entries — only cards that are Forbidden, Limited, or Semi-Limited in a format appear here

columns.name: status
columns.description: Restriction status: 'Forbidden' (0 copies), 'Limited' (1 copy), or 'Semi-Limited' (2 copies)
